title: just be
body:
))}}

))}}

))}}

why would my belly be so hot
why's everything blurry
my body feels buried
the burning
i'd barely believe it
if it wasn't me beset
it's because of that beating
they battered the boy bloody
boneheaded
they baited me
but i bit it
itty bitty bitey debating
the buzzing it bothered me
bug off i told em
buh buh buh
a band of brownshirt busy pounding down brown
booze bronzed feeling bestowed with a crown
the blond with the buzz cut bucked up
banging his breast like a bell wasn't busted
barking like a bloodshot broker demanding his cut
i waited bated embodied my best
his buddy behind me
backstabbing blindly
the blade broke off inside me
bottom rib biting
i broke out
hoping someone would find me
before the bayou could brine me
then i blacked out
that brings us abruptly back to the present
the blue sky is blinding
my breathing is bubbly baby
i don't know if i'll

))}}

be quiet you're belly aching, babblin
i'm begging you
be big when you're battling back
i'll be beside you
i'm building my bed by you
cuz i'd be beside myself
if you bled out and i'm by myself
broken bereft
a bent black banshee
bargaining death
like a basement bin laddin
and i brought a basket in
i'd be a basketcase
tell me who the bastard is
i wanna bash his face
i bet i 'd buy something to bind it
blessed be i remembered to buy a belt
there's a bandage in the bottom of the bag
